title: MuslinZ 3PK Baby Muslin Squares, Burp Cloths, Newborn Essentials, Soft Bamboo/Organic Cotton 70 x 70cm (Aqua Leaf)
features: MuslinZ brand pack of 3 luxurious quality muslin squares
Made from 70% Bamboo and 30% Organic Cotton, excellent quality, more absorbent and wonderfully soft on delicate skin. Machine washable at 30c - the more you wash the softer they get.
Use for swaddling a newborn, burping, lightweight baby blanket, shielding when breastfeeding, crib sheet, changing mat cover, shade, play mat, bath towel etc.
Exclusive print designed in UK manufactured by MuslinZ in Oeko-Tex and ISO certified factory. MuslinZ is a registered brand
description: MuslinZ Bamboo/Organic Cotton muslin squares are luxuriously soft with the qualities of Bamboo and the added strength of Organic Cotton. They have a slightly tighter weave so are more absorbent and wonderfully soft on your little ones delicate skin. Use for nappies, swaddling, burping, lightweight baby blanket, shielding when breastfeeding, crib sheet, changing mat cover etc. Muslins are useful for newborns when swaddling and later on as a lightweight cover in a pram, something to throw over the shoulder or a security blanket! Made from 70% Bamboo and 30% Organic Cotton muslin so breathable, soft and durable. The more you wash the softer they get. Perfect as a baby shower gift, part of a baby hamper or to put in your hospital bag. Exclusive print designed by MuslinZ in the UK and manufactured in Oeko-Tex and ISO certified factory. MuslinZ is a registered Trade Mark.
